subject: A horned, bull-like creature mid-leap engulfed in a roaring blast of orange and yellow flame
description: A muscular horned beast — silhouetted in deep orange against a brighter yellow-white core of flame — leaps forward through the center of an enormous fireball. The flames radiate outward in petal-like tongues and licks against an ochre and red-streaked sky, evoking an immolating sacrifice. The animal's body is mostly rendered as a dark shape consumed by the burst, horns and forelimbs barely visible against the pyre. The composition is symmetrical and explosive, with the figure dead-center and fire spreading to all edges of the frame.
foreground: horned beast leaping into a fireball
background: fiery sky filled with billowing flame and smoke
